$comment: FC17.5 D-CSUBSET-FUNC-PREDEFINED-IDENTIFIER (C99 6.4.2.2): `__func__` end-to-end. fn[0]=='m' (fold + decay) -> 10; len_of(__func__)==4 (call-arg decay + full byte walk incl. the NUL) -> 4; `__func__ == __func__` -> 1 (the F2 identity REQUIREMENT: both folded reads share ONE memoized rodata global — RED-on-disable for the byte-content memo); __FUNCTION__[0]=='m' -> 1 (the GNU alias, config vocabulary); helper()'s __func__[0]=='h' -> 1 (PER-FUNCTION content); sizeof __func__ == 5 -> 5 (the semantic Array<char,5> stamp — a decayed 8 breaks the exit). exit = 10+4+1+1+1+5+20 = 42, data-model independent. RED-on-revert: __func__ becomes an undeclared identifier.
